## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change? One or two sentences. -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this change needed? Link the issue it closes, if any. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] pre-commit hooks pass locally (`pre-commit run --all-files`)
- [ ] `swift test` is green
- [ ] `./kotlin/gradlew -p kotlin check` is green (if the Kotlin side was touched)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under **Unreleased** (if the change is user-facing)
- [ ] Docs updated (README / `docs/`) if behavior or public API changed
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
